action.description: Use get-state to read state. Use set-autopilot-state with one supported state object to request a drone autopilot state.

tensorfleet-project-path.description: Optional Tensorfleet project directory path for legacy .tensorfleet/.env fallback.

landed.description: Optional payload for action=set-autopilot-state. Produces autoState={kind:"landed",armed}.

armed.description: Desired arm state after landing. true arms, false disarms, null or omitted leaves arm state unchanged.

airborne_position_local.description: Optional payload for action=set-autopilot-state. Local ENU frame target (East-North-Up): +x east, +y north, +z up. Produces autoState={kind:"offboard",target:{kind:"position_local",x,y,z,yawRad?}}.

x.description: Local X position target in meters. In the ENU frame, positive X is east.

y.description: Local Y position target in meters. In the ENU frame, positive Y is north.

z.description: Local Z position target in meters. In the ENU frame, positive Z is up.
